name: Taco Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate.
3. Cook and stir the beef and onion until the beef is brown; drain any excess fat.
4. Stir in the seasoning mix and spread the mixture into the prepared plate.
5. Sprinkle with chilies.
6. Beat the milk, Bisquick, and eggs together until smooth (15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute using a hand beater).
7. Pour the batter over the contents of the plate.
8. Bake for 25 minutes.
9. Top with sliced tomatoes and sprinkle with shredded Monterey jack cheese.
10. Bake until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (approximately 8-10 minutes).
